heading: Step 1: Choose your initial  pipeline stage.
body:
The first stage of your MongoDB Search query aggregation pipeline must be either the [$search](pipe.$search) or [$searchMeta](pipe.$searchMeta) stage,
depending on whether you're searching for documents or metadata:

| Aggregation Pipeline Stage | Purpose                                          |
| -------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| $search                    | Return the search results of a full-text search. |
| $searchMeta                | Return metadata about your search results.       |
